user.title: EvilCrowRF V2 — Setup Method
user.description: Choose how to configure the EvilCrowRF V2 device.

data_description.setup_method: Select how you want to add the device.

manual_device.title: EvilCrowRF V2 — Manual Configuration
manual_device.description: Enter the IP address or hostname and port of your EvilCrowRF device.

data_description.host: The IP address or hostname of the EvilCrowRF device on your network.

discovery.title: EvilCrowRF V2 — Discovered Devices
discovery.description: {num_devices} device(s) found. Select the device to configure.

data_description.device_index: Choose a device from the list.

reconfigure.title: EvilCrowRF V2 — Reconfigure Device
reconfigure.description: Update the connection settings for your EvilCrowRF device.

data_description.host: The new IP address or hostname of the EvilCrowRF device.

options.title: EvilCrowRF V2 — Monitoring Settings
options.description: Configure signal monitoring and unknown signal exposure for this device.

data_description.monitor_enabled: When enabled, the device continuously listens for RF signals on the configured frequency.
data_description.monitor_module: Which CC1101 module to use: 0 = primary, 1 = secondary (if available).
data_description.monitor_rssi_threshold: Signals below this RSSI threshold (in dBm) will be ignored. Range: -127 to 0.
data_description.expose_unknown: When enabled, unknown (unmatched) signals will be surfaced as transient entities.
data_description.expose_unknown_min_occurrences: How many times an unknown signal must be detected before it is exposed as an entity.
data_description.expose_unknown_window_seconds: The time window (in seconds) during which occurrences are counted.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the device. Check the IP address and ensure the device is powered on.
error.invalid_host: The hostname or IP address is not valid.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
error.no_devices_found: No EvilCrowRF devices were discovered on the network. Try manual configuration.

abort.no_devices_found: No EvilCrowRF devices were found on the network.
abort.reconfigure_successful: Device configuration updated successfully. The integration will reload.
abort.already_in_progress: Configuration is already in progress for this device.

create_entry.default: Successfully connected to the EvilCrowRF device.

init.title: EvilCrowRF V2 — Monitoring Settings
init.description: Configure signal monitoring and unknown signal exposure.

data_description.monitor_enabled: When enabled, the device continuously listens for RF signals.
data_description.monitor_module: Which CC1101 module to use: 0 = primary, 1 = secondary (if available).
data_description.monitor_rssi_threshold: Signals below this RSSI threshold (in dBm) will be ignored.
data_description.expose_unknown: When enabled, unknown (unmatched) signals will be surfaced as transient entities.
data_description.expose_unknown_min_occurrences: How many times an unknown signal must be detected before it is exposed.

error.invalid_rssi: RSSI threshold must be between -127 and 0.
error.invalid_occurrences: Minimum occurrences must be between 1 and 100.
error.invalid_window: Detection window must be between 5 and 3600 seconds.
